mnemonics: NORVIG's NAME: Notes On Reasoning & Vision In AI. This links his name to his key contributions in AI textbooks (AIMA) and his work at Google on search and vision.
keyPoints: Co-author of 'Artificial Intelligence: A Modern Approach' (AIMA), the seminal textbook on AI.
Director of Research at Google, overseeing core search and machine intelligence efforts.
Pioneer in AI who worked on unifying logic, probability, and learning in intelligent systems.
commonMistakes: Confusing Peter Norvig with other AI pioneers like Stuart Russell (his co-author) or Ray Kurzweil.
Assuming his work is only theoretical because of the textbook; he has also held very high-level applied industry roles.
Misspelling his last name as 'Norving' instead of the correct 'Norvig'.
